title: OSCAR II – publishing data from the database: September 2025
body: "The first quarterly data for the financial year 2025-26. This dataset, in addition to the previous OSCAR and COINS releases, makes public spending data more accessible.  OSCAR II is a cross-government project to replace the first OSCAR and Combined Online Information System (COINS) public spending databases. It provides us with key management information and data for public reporting. "
